scene_title: Rosto humano partido ao meio deepfake
narrative_beat: Metade medieval carmesim metade digital P&B

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: colorful vivid human face split down the middle left half as vivid crimson ochre medieval saint portrait right half as monochrome grey deepfake digital with fire line dividing them in vibrant composition
subject.focal_point: the fire line dividing the authentic and the artificial halves of the face
subject.secondary: black and white desaturated computer screens showing video editing interface in background

lighting.fill_light: cold digital fill on grey half

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber-grey split grading

mood.emotion: the face that cannot be trusted — deepfake as prophetic enactment

symbolism.primary: the image that deceives — Revelation 13:14 made operational
symbolism.secondary: fire line as the only remaining marker between real and artificial

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
muted desaturated background palette warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
